**Articles collected span:**
- **Q1 2024** - Q4 2025 earnings results and previews
- **Coverage types:** Earnings call transcripts, beat/miss analysis, financial results, analyst expectations, guidance, and market analysis
- **Sources:** Yahoo Finance, Investing.com, PRNewswire, Simply Wall St, Stock Titan, The Motley Fool, and other financial platforms

**Article Structure:** Each JSON file contains:
- URL to the original source
- Article title
- Published date (null when unknown)
- Scraped timestamp
- Full article text (deduplicated, boilerplate removed)
- Topic and source metadata

The collection includes both positive results (beat quarters with strong cannabis growth) and challenging periods (Q3 2025 miss, Q1 2026 market softness), providing comprehensive historical context for SNDL's earnings performance across multiple reporting periods.

Sources:
- [SNDL Inc. Earnings Reports (Yahoo Finance)](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SNDL/)
- [SNDL Earnings Transcripts (Investing.com)](https://www.investing.com/)
- [SNDL Earnings Dates & Report (Seeking Alpha)](https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SNDL/earnings)
- [SNDL Inc. Financial Results (SNDL Official)](https://sndl.com/financials/)
